description: A development team is preparing to move their three-service application at /home/ga/webapp/ to production. Harden the deployment by implementing health checks, resource limits (CPU and memory), and appropriate restart policies for all services. Additionally, implement network isolation using separate frontend and backend networks. The application must remain fully functional at http://localhost:9080 after hardening. Modify the existing files in /home/ga/webapp/. Login: ga / password123
